rules.note: Statblocks the program references from clan / class / jutsu features — Nin-Dogs, fusion forms, summoned constructs. Each entry mirrors the in-source statblock as faithfully as the data shape allows; the consuming feature points here by `id`.

creatures.name: Nin-Dog
creatures.saveNote: Add your proficiency bonus with the listed Mod to calculate the save bonus; all others add only half your prof bonus.
senses: Keen Smell & Hearing (advantage on Perception checks to Smell or Hear something)

traits.name: Tag-Team
traits.description: The Nin-Dog can cast any jutsu its master knows with the Tag-Team keyword when commanded to Synchronize.

traits.name: Master's Strength
traits.description: If a jutsu your Nin-Dog casts with the Tag-Team keyword requires a saving throw, they can use your Taijutsu Save DC or their own Jutsu Save DC, whichever is higher.

traits.name: Own Strength
traits.description: The Nin-Dog uses either its Strength or Dexterity to determine its Jutsu save DC.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: 5 ft., one target. Str + Prof to hit, 1d6 + Mod Piercing damage. Increases to 2d6 at 11th level.

progression.description: Increase one ability modifier and its associated save by +1 (max +6). Repeats at 8, 12, 16, 19.

creatures.summary: Your canine companion. Acts as part of your turn but has its own reaction (used for Tag-Team Hijutsu). Treated as the same level as you. Starts Small; grows to Medium at L7, Large at L15. If reduced to 0 HP, makes Death saving throws. If killed, a Full-Rest ritual with the clan replaces them with a same-breed, same-level, same-traits dog.

creatures.name: Two-Headed Wolf
creatures.size: Huge (one size larger than your Nin-Dog, max Huge)
creatures.armorClass: 15 + Proficiency bonus, or your AC, whichever is higher

int.note: Use your or your Nin-Dog's mod, whichever is higher

wis.note: Use your or your Nin-Dog's mod, whichever is higher

cha.note: Use your or your Nin-Dog's mod, whichever is higher

senses: All of your Nin-Dog's senses, plus your own.

traits.name: Shared Fortitude
traits.description: You gain all resistances and immunities you had prior to the fusion.

traits.name: Shared Mind
traits.description: Use your or your Nin-Dog's ability modifiers for Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma while in this state, whichever is higher.

traits.name: Shared Strength
traits.description: You gain the benefits of your Nin-Dog's traits where applicable.

traits.name: Class Limits
traits.description: You can use your Class and clan features while in this state. Your Bite is treated as both a weapon and unarmed attack. Taking the Attack action lets you attack with your Bite. If your weapon had Seals, your Bite inherits their effects.

traits.name: Inherent Knowledge
traits.description: You can still cast jutsu you know, ignoring hand signs when needed.

traits.name: Shared Body
traits.description: While in this state, you gain an additional action which you can only use to cast a Tag-Team jutsu on the same turn (only using its Tag-Team effect).

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: 5 ft., one target. Str or Dex + Prof to hit, 2d12 + Mod Piercing damage.

creatures.summary: Fused Inuzuka + Nin-Dog form (L15 Two-Headed Wolf feature). Maintained for 1 minute. If you fall to 0 HP, the fusion ends — Nin-Dog has 1 HP, you have half your max HP.

creatures.name: Dream Walker

str.note: Base modifiers — applied differently per dream type

creatures.saveNote: Strong Dreams — Increase all modifiers by +1 at 7th level and again at 15th level.

traits.name: Illusory Construct
traits.description: Cannot physically interact with the environment; cannot be more than 60 ft from its summoner before being dispelled. Moves through other creatures' spaces as if difficult terrain. Reduces its HP by 5 if it ends its turn inside an object where its summoner cannot see it. Save DC effects use your Ninjutsu or Genjutsu save DC.

traits.name: Strong Dreams
traits.description: Increase all modifiers by +1 at 7th level and again at 15th level.

actions.name: Strike (Melee)
actions.description: Melee Genjutsu Attack: 5 ft., one target. Highest Mod + Prof to hit, 1d8 + Mod psychic damage. Increases to 2d8 at 11th.

actions.name: Strike (Ranged)
actions.description: Ranged Genjutsu Attack: 30 ft., one target. Highest Mod + Prof to hit, 1d6 + Mod psychic damage. Increases to 2d6 at 11th.

ability.name: Beast Pounce
ability.description: One creature within 15 feet must make an Intelligence saving throw, being knocked prone and Dazed on a failed save.

ability.name: Demon's Bargain
ability.description: One creature within 20 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw, going Berserk on a failed save. Once used, cannot be used again until the end of your next turn.

ability.name: Dragon's Breath
ability.description: All creatures in a 30-foot cone must make a Charisma saving throw, being Weakened on a failed save.

ability.name: Fey Trickery
ability.description: One creature within 60 feet must make an Intelligence saving throw, being Dazzled on a failed save.

ability.name: Spider's Web
ability.description: All creatures within a 10-foot cube, centered on a point you can see within 30 feet, must make a Wisdom saving throw, being Concussed on a failed save.

creatures.summary: Illusory construct born from your subconscious. Selected on rest from one of five dream types (Beast / Demon / Dragon / Fey / Spider) — each grants different ability bonuses, resistances, movement, and a special Distort ability. Only obeys you. If reduced to 0 HP, dispelled until your next rest. Can be replaced by a known summon-construct's statblock for 2 Oni-Coils when casting a summon jutsu or finishing a rest with one known.

creatures.name: Wood Dragon
creatures.saveNote: Uses caster's highest jutsu attack bonus or save DC for effects that require it.

traits.name: Ineffable Makeup
traits.description: The Wood Dragon cannot be dispelled by any jutsu of B-Rank or lower.

traits.name: Body of Nature
traits.description: The Wood Dragon automatically critically succeeds saving throws against Genjutsu.

traits.name: Multiattack
traits.description: The Wood Dragon can attack 2 times with its Bite.

traits.name: Constrict
traits.description: On a successful Bite attack, the Wood Dragon can forgo its next attack to instead constrict the target so long as it has another attack to make. If it does, the target makes a Strength save being Restrained by the Dragon. While restrained, the affected creature is treated as if they have 3 ranks of Drained. A restrained creature remakes their save at the end of their turn, breaking free on a success.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: reach 10 ft, one creature. Hit: 2d8 + 6 Earth damage. Once per turn on a hit, the target makes a Constitution save gaining 2 ranks of Drained on a failed save.

actions.name: Detonation
actions.description: The dragon explodes in a massive incendiary explosion. All creatures within 15 ft of the Dragon make a Dexterity save, taking 8d8 Earth damage on a failed save or half on a successful one. A creature restrained by the dragon makes its save at disadvantage; on failure, takes double damage. Use as a Bonus Action or Reaction.

creatures.summary: Conjured construct from the B-Rank Wood Release: Wood Dragon Summoning. Acts at the end of each of caster's turns; only listens to caster. Concentration up to 1 minute.

creatures.name: Neon Antivirus

traits.name: Embedded Programming
traits.description: The Neon Antivirus is always Signal Boosted but cannot benefit from its bonus to hit or saving throws.

traits.name: Special Frequency
traits.description: If the summoner is in Uplink or Downlink stance, the Neon Antivirus gains the associated benefit (Angel Link or Demon Link).

traits.name: Angel Link
traits.description: Emits a healing aura in a 20-foot radius. Allied creatures that begin their turn within the aura gain +1 to saves and regain 6 HP + 6 HP per rank beyond D-Rank at the start of each of their turns.

traits.name: Demon Link
traits.description: Emits a wrathful presence in a 20-foot radius. Hostile creatures within have total DR reduced by 2 + 2 per rank beyond D-Rank, and suffer -1 to saving throws.

traits.name: Multiattack
traits.description: The Neon Antivirus can make two attacks with its Neon Blast or Neon Claws.

traits.name: Data Share (Recharge 3-4)
traits.description: The Neon Antivirus can cast one Genwa Hijutsu of a rank equal to the rank it was summoned at that the summoner knows, except Data Release: Antivirus.

actions.name: Neon Blast
actions.description: Ranged Jutsu Attack: +[summoner's highest jutsu attack mod], reach 40 ft, one creature. Hit: 1d8 + 4 lightning damage + 2 lightning per rank beyond D-Rank.

actions.name: Neon Claws
actions.description: Melee Jutsu Attack: +[summoner's highest jutsu attack mod], reach 5 ft, one creature. Hit: 1d12 + 3 lightning damage + 3 lightning per rank beyond D-Rank.

creatures.summary: Summoned by the D-Rank Data Release: Antivirus jutsu. Commanded as a Bonus Action by the summoner. At B-Rank or higher, summon two — the second always uses the opposite Link effect.

creatures.name: Steam Imp
creatures.saveNote: Str/Dex/Con saves use summoner's Ninjutsu ability modifier as the creature's proficiency bonus.

traits.name: Mist's Tyranny
traits.description: When the Steam Imp is reduced to 0 HP, it uses its Detonation ability.

traits.name: Looping Destruction (B-Rank)
traits.description: At the beginning of your following turn, if the Steam Imp has detonated since your last turn and you are concentrating on the jutsu used to summon it AND either Misty Hallucination / Water Balloon / Demonic Illusion: Steaming Mirage, the Steam Imp is summoned again at no additional cost.

traits.name: Growing Pains
traits.description: At the end of each of your turns following its summoning, the Steam Imp grows in size by 1 stage. If it grows to Huge, it uses its Detonation ability.

traits.name: Multiattack (B-Rank)
traits.description: The Steam Imp can attack 2 times with its Arm Blade.

actions.name: Arm Blade
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: reach 5 ft, one creature. Hit: 1d12 + 7 Slashing damage. At A-Rank, also +1d12 cold damage.

actions.name: Detonation
actions.description: The Steam Imp cannot spend an action to use this ability. When it Detonates, its HP drops to 0 and all creatures within 15 ft make a Dex save — 6d6 cold damage on failure; constructs and structures treat damage as if vulnerable. Increase by +1d6 for every rank beyond C-Rank.

creatures.summary: Summoned by the C-Rank Steaming Danger: Tyranny jutsu. Commanded as a Bonus Action. Uses summoner's Ninjutsu attack bonus and Save DC.

creatures.name: Demonic Blizzard Dragon

actions.name: Ram
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: reach 5 ft, one creature. Hit: 6d6 + 6 Cold damage. When this dragon scores a successful Ram attack, it can Detonate at the summoner's command.

actions.name: Detonate
actions.description: The Demonic Blizzard Dragon explodes forcing all creatures within 10 ft (excluding caster) to make a Dexterity save — 10d6 cold damage and 2 ranks Chilled + Frostbite on failure; half on success.

creatures.summary: Summoned by the A-Rank Ice Release: Demonic Blizzard Dragon jutsu. Uses summoner's Ninjutsu attack bonus and Save DC. Commanded as a Bonus Action.

creatures.name: Clay Spider

traits.name: Shock Weakness
traits.description: If this creature takes Lightning damage it cannot perform its Detonate attack until the end of its caster's next turn. It also cannot Detonate while it has the Shocked condition.

traits.name: Silent Scurry
traits.description: When summoned, make a Stealth check using your highest jutsu modifier vs any hostile creature that can see you. On success, the Clay Spider is Undetected by creatures without Chakra Sight or Chakra Sense.

traits.name: Purpose to BOOM
traits.description: Once summoned, this creature has 1 minute before it self-Detonates. If it cannot Detonate after this 1-minute duration, it dispels itself.

traits.name: Scurry
traits.description: The Spider takes the Dash and Disengage action as part of this action.

actions.name: Grab
actions.description: Attempts to grab onto a creature. Target makes a Dex save. On failure, the spider holds on. The creature can attempt a Str save to pull the spider free.

actions.name: Detonate
actions.description: Fills a 5-foot radius. All creatures in radius make a Dex save, taking force damage on failure (half on success) based on rank summoned: D/C: 3d6, B/A: 4d6, S: 5d6. If a creature is in multiple Detonating Spiders' radii, they make a single save but +2d6 per additional radius they're in. A grappled creature saves at disadvantage.

creatures.summary: Summoned by D-Rank Explosion Release: Clay Spiders. Up to 5 active at once. Commanded as Action or Bonus Action.

creatures.name: Clay Bird

traits.name: Flying Mount
traits.description: Primary purpose is to be a flying mount. A creature of your choice can mount. While mounted, replace movement with the Clay Bird's. You cannot command it to move separately from you unless you dismount by spending 5 ft of movement. Attacks targeting the mounted creature do not harm the Clay Bird and vice versa. A mounted creature can spend its reaction to switch targets, interposing. Area effects affect both individually.

traits.name: Shock Weakness
traits.description: If this creature takes Lightning damage it cannot Detonate until the end of its caster's next turn. Also cannot Detonate while Shocked.

traits.name: Purpose to BOOM
traits.description: Once summoned, has 1 minute before self-Detonates. If it cannot Detonate after 1 minute, it dispels itself.

actions.name: Ram
actions.description: If the Clay Bird flies in a straight line for at least 30 ft, can perform Ram attack. All creatures in the straight line make a Dexterity save, taking 6d6 bludgeoning damage on failure (half on success).

actions.name: Detonate
actions.description: Fills a 10-foot radius centered on it. All creatures in radius make a Dex save, taking force damage based on rank: D/C: 4d8, B/A: 5d8, S: 6d8. If multiple Clay Birds Detonate and target a creature in multiple radii, they make a single save but +2d8 per additional radius.

creatures.summary: Summoned by C-Rank Explosion Release: Clay Bird. One active at a time (2 at A-Rank). Commanded as Action or Bonus Action.

creatures.name: Clay Centipede

traits.name: Shock Weakness
traits.description: If this creature takes Lightning damage it cannot Detonate until the end of its caster's next turn. Also cannot Detonate while Shocked.

traits.name: Purpose to BOOM
traits.description: Once summoned, has 1 minute before self-Detonates. If it cannot Detonate after 1 minute, it dispels itself.

traits.name: Bug Bomb
traits.description: When this creature falls to 0 HP it uses its Detonate attack as a reaction.

traits.name: Multiattack
traits.description: The Clay Centipede can attack 2 times with its pincers.

actions.name: Pincers
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: reach 10 ft, one creature. Hit: 2d6 + 4 piercing damage.

actions.name: Body Wrap
actions.description: Attempt to grapple a creature. Target makes a Dex save, Grappled on failure. The creature can Action or end-of-turn save Str save to break free.

actions.name: Detonate
actions.description: Fills a 10-foot radius centered on it. All creatures in radius make a Dex save, taking force damage based on rank: B/A: 6d6, S: 8d6. If multiple Centipedes Detonate on the same creature in multiple radii, single save but +2d6 per additional radius.

creatures.summary: Summoned by B-Rank Explosion Release: Clay Centipede. Up to 2 active at a time. Commanded as Action or Bonus Action.

creatures.name: Clay Dragon

traits.name: Flying Mount
traits.description: Primary purpose is to be a flying mount. A creature of your choice can mount. While mounted, replace movement with the Clay Dragon's. You cannot command it to move separately from you unless you dismount by spending 5 ft of movement. Attacks targeting the mounted creature must instead target the Dragon and vice versa. Area effects affect only the Clay Dragon.

traits.name: Shock Weakness
traits.description: If this creature takes Lightning damage it cannot Detonate until the end of its caster's next turn. Also cannot Detonate while Shocked.

traits.name: Purpose to BOOM
traits.description: Once summoned, has 1 minute before self-Detonates. If it cannot Detonate after 1 minute, it dispels itself.

traits.name: Multiattack
traits.description: The Clay Dragon can attack 2 times with its Tail.

actions.name: Tail
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: reach 10 ft, one creature. Hit: 3d8 + 5 Earth damage.

actions.name: Explosive Breath
actions.description: The Clay Dragon casts Explosion Release: Clay Missiles at C-Rank as if you had cast it, using your Ninjutsu attack bonus, save DC or ability modifier.

actions.name: Detonate
actions.description: Fills a 10-foot radius centered on it. All creatures in radius make a Dex save, taking force damage based on rank: A: 8d8, S: 12d8.

creatures.summary: Summoned by A-Rank Explosion Release: Clay Dragon. One active at a time. Commanded as Action or Bonus Action.
